//: Dev-only typecheck config (never shipped — not in package.json 'files'). Checking is OPT-IN per file via a `// @ts-check` pragma (checkJs:false), so adding the pragma to a file enrolls it; files without it are parsed for their exported types but their own bodies aren't error-checked. The shipped player's inline <script> lives in vellum-template.html (.html, not matched here) and stays unchecked by design. Run: npm run typecheck.
